title: mikania callineura
intro: Mikania callineura, also known as the Mexican mint, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Mikania callineura include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
